subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mighty! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast cast aside the stream and turned unto the Most Great Ocean that hath appeared through this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قدیر طوبی لک بما نبذت الغدیر و اقبلت الی البحر الاعظم الذی ظهر بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
